title: Veckans aktie – analytikern ser köpläge: "I sluttampen på omstrukturering"
summary_md:
# Veckans aktie – analytikern ser köpläge: "I sluttampen på omstrukturering"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-25  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode is a 'stock of the week' deep-dive on Securitas, framed by analyst Agneta as a buy opportunity now that the company is in the final stretch of its multi-year restructuring after the 2021-2022 Stanley Security acquisition. The thesis rests on a growing, higher-margin technology/software segment lifting operating margins toward 10%, falling debt (4x to 2x EBIT), a solid 3-4% dividend yield, and a valuation discount versus peers that should re-rate as the tech mix grows. The host and analyst see over 30% upside on a re-rating from ~13x to 15x earnings.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 SECU-B — Securitas | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Late-stage restructuring, growing higher-margin tech segment lifting margins toward 10%, debt down from 4x to 2x EBIT, 3-4% dividend, discount to peers, >30% upside on re-rating to 15x.

#### Reasoning

Analyst argues Securitas is finishing its transformation: tech/software (12% margin, ~15% software growth) increasingly outweighs traditional manual guarding (6% margin), pushing group operating margin past the 8% milestone toward a 10% target. Deleveraging from the Stanley deal (4x→2x EBIT) opens room for buybacks, higher dividends or M&A. June 16 capital markets day may raise margin targets. Stock has fallen out of favor in 2026 despite improving fundamentals; re-rating from ~13x to 15x earnin

#### Sell Triggers

- if the capital markets day disappoints on margin targets
- if the tech/software margin expansion stalls
- if restructuring of unprofitable contracts drags rather than completes
- if debt or interest costs rise again
- if wage inflation pressures the labor-intensive segment

> *"nu med tanke på att man börjar bli färdig med det här paketet man håller på med. Och att de har planat ut lite så kan det vara läge att titta på dem igen."*

---
